title: Leech Group
description: High-speed WZML-X leech group for Telegram. Supports Torrents, YouTube, and direct links from various sites.

title: Leech Dump
description: The official dump channel where all processed files from the leech group are uploaded.

title: Save Restricted Content
description: Extract and save content from restricted Telegram channels that prevent forwarding or saving messages.

title: Rename Bot
description: Rename files, convert video to file and vice versa, and generate high-quality screenshots from videos.

title: Video Compressor
description: Compress and convert videos to various qualities (720p, 480p, 360p) based on the original file.

title: Bypass Group
description: Automatically bypass link shorteners like Papaji, Lksfy, Arolinks, Rempo, and more.

title: Change Thumbnail
description: Set a custom thumbnail once, and the bot will apply it to every video you send automatically.

title: File Store Bot
description: Store files and get shareable links with support for custom buttons, captions, and link shorteners.
